title: Complexity budget exhausted
excerpt:
Hi there, 
In doing a simple query to an item (C#, GraphQL.Client.Http) i’m receiving an error “Complexity budget exhausted, query cost 2100080 budget remaining 1000000 out of 1000000 reset in 60 seconds”. My code is fai…

posts.author: Marshmallow (Joshua de Wit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

In doing a simple query to an item (C#, GraphQL.Client.Http) i’m receiving an error “Complexity budget exhausted, query cost 2100080 budget remaining 1000000 out of 1000000 reset in 60 seconds”. My code is fairly simple, so i’m not sure why it’s coming across as a costly query. There is only 1 item on the board with 6 columns. Any suggestions?

Query = @"query request($id:Int) { items(ids: [$id]) { id name board { id name description board_kind state board_folder_id } group { id title color archived deleted } column_values { id text title type value additional_info } subscribers { id name email } updates(limit: 100000) { id body text_body replies { id body text_body creator_id creator { id name email } created_at updated_at } creator_id creator { id name email } created_at updated_at } creator_id created_at updated_at creator { id name email } } } ",
Variables = new
{
id = itemId
}

posts.author: supriya.k (Supriya)
posts.cookedHtml: I am facing a similar problem. My query is fetching only board info and is a very simple query. I get the the complexity exhausted error frequently during runtime. During debug mode sometimes the same query works. Appreciate your guidance here.

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. were you able to fix this problem? I am currently presenting the same problem. Please advise.
